nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 法屬圭亞那

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sclater]] & Salvin, 1877 | synonyms = |range_map = Euphonia finschi map.svg }} Finsch's euphonia (Euphonia finschi) is a species of bird in the family Fringillidae, the finches and euphonias. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, Guyana, Suriname and Venezuela.AviList Core Team

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Finsch's euphonia is found primarily across most of Guyana, most of Suriname, and in northern French Guiana. Its range extends very slightly west into extreme southeastern Venezuela, where it is known from a specimen and a few sight records. It also occurs very slightly into far northern Brazil's Roraima state with isolated records further south and east in the country. It inhabits somewhat open landscapes, many of which are on sandy soil
